meaning: adj.多断株的,断株样的,短而粗的
examples: He had long unkempt hair and a stubbly chin.
Between sentences he would work his stubbly chin as if chewing on unpalatable facts. Then he'd sing.
With sunken eyes, more grey hairs and stubbly beard in his unshaven chin, Tang looked much older, very haggard and tired.
He is 5ft 6ins tall, of slim build with unkempt black hair and had a stubbly chin but may now have a full beard.
Ali is portly with a stubbly beard.
